title: Granny Smith AppleZ
description: Turns apples green like Granny Smiths!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6280798e4e07dccc06d2764ac94278a727b785c1.png)


**NOW WITH TASTY ITEMS SUPPORT!**

NOTICE: Check the Versions tab and read descriptions to get the right pack!

The Granny Smith AppleZ resource pack gives every Minecraft apple a tart twist by transforming them into crisp, vibrant Granny Smiths—clearly the superior choice. What started as a fun idea sparked by ChatGPT has grown into a fully realized pack featuring 32x resolution textures, Bare Bones-inspired apples, and even a throwback to the classic apple design for a nostalgic touch. It’s built to blend effortlessly with other resource packs, offering a fresh, zesty upgrade to your game. (Note: Some textures are adapted from other creators.)

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
